div.p: Path MTU Discovery Fails Sending host creates 4000-byte IP datagram First hop link has MTU = 1500 bytes DF (Don't Fragment) flag = 0 Router must fragment to proceed

ol.li: Each fragment gets its own IP header (20 bytes)
Fragment offset in 8-byte units (divide byte offset by 8)
All fragments share same Identification field
MF (More Fragments) = 1 on all except last
Data must be multiple of 8 (except last fragment)

g.text: Max payload per frag = MTU - IP_HDR = 1500 - 20 = 1480

div.p: Reassembly Buffer State (out-of-order arrival) Fragments may arrive in any order due to:

ul.li: Retransmissions Receiver buffers until all gaps filled

g.text: Identification | Groups fragments of same datagram
Source IP + Dest IP | Distinguish senders
Protocol | TCP vs UDP reassembly separate
MF flag + offset | Detect last fragment, fill gaps

div.p: Fragment 2 arrives first (offset=185, len=1480) Buffer: [?????][DATA2][???????] gap recv gap
Fragment 1 arrives (offset=0, len=1480) Buffer: [DATA1][DATA2][???????] recv recv gap
Fragment 3 arrives (LAST) (offset=370, len=1020) Buffer: [DATA1][DATA2][DATA3] recv recv recv Complete! Deliver to upper layer
